channel.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
channel.description: Hi, I am a new user of Frontity. I just try for the first time but my web site is multilingual. So, I made a fresh install and just set my Wordpress home in the settings. It seems impossible to have a home page. Other pages in the menu ar displayed but never the home page. Do you have some tips for me ? Other Wordpress install with WPML ? Thanks in advance for your help, David

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I think we know of a couple of multilingual projects using Frontity, but I don’t know in detail what approach they used. My guess is that none of them used WPML.

It seems like these two REST API URLs are working:

  • https://www.dldnet.com/wp-json/wp/v2/pages/698
  • https://www.dldnet.com/fr/wp-json/wp/v2/pages/698

Do you have more languages apart from french?

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @David_BE,

We’re doing some research regarding your questions.
Will be back to you ASAP

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: David_BE
item.description:
I have searched in another discussion:

Multi-language website with frontity 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions
Hi! Is there any way to develop a multi-language website with frontity? I imagine that we can do it installing a wordpress plugin for translation but if I have custom pages I will need the translation in my frontity/react application too. How can I do it? It’s possible? I dont know if is possible to pass a parameter to the frontity state and filter my posts/pages passing the selected language. Best regards

That’s ok to have the multi-lingual configuration like this.
Except that the homepage is not found (404).
I don’t understand how to do it.

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: David_BE
item.description:
WPML is just adding a /xx (xx for language code) before all the links. So, I start with a site in french.
I have “/fr” for each page (replaced with a “/en” for all the english translation for example).
I have a sample site to test everything, you can check the output of Wordpress
https://dldnet.com
As french is the default language, it starts with a redirect to https://dldnet.com/fr/
I have tried to declare /fr/ as homepage in frontity.setting.js but it is always a 404 error.

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Hey @David_BE, do you have any information about how WPML deals with REST API output?

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site

item.title: First try with WPML Wordpress site
item.dc:creator: David_BE
item.description:
Hi, I am a new user of Frontity.
I just try for the first time but my web site is multilingual.
So, I made a fresh install and just set my Wordpress home in the settings.
It seems impossible to have a home page. Other pages in the menu ar displayed but never the home page.
Do you have some tips for me ?
Other Wordpress install with WPML ?
Thanks in advance for your help,
David

Read full topic
item.source: First try with WPML Wordpress site
